title: Centos8 podman is 1.1.0?
body: Why the podman version is 1.1.0 in centos8, how can I install the latest version of podman use yum ?

comments.body: Probably not until centos enables sig repos for centos8. For now you gotta wait for stuff to land in base CentOS.
Centos7 is v1.4.4, but I really want to use the latest version of podman!
